training_status: Active, similar build and body fat to OP, lifting

benefits.description: Losing 2 lbs per week while increasing muscle and strength slightly
Increasing a little muscle and strength at week 6

side_effects.description: At 3mg/week struggling to eat enough, choking food down. Tried 4mg/week (first 2mg shot), felt sick thinking about food. Bumped back to 3mg/week. Considering going back to 2mg/week.

protocol_notes: 6'3", similar build to OP. At week 6 of reta protocol. Dose escalation: started at lower doses, reached 3mg/week at week 4, attempted 4mg/week at week 5 but GI side effects too severe, returned to 3mg/week. Recommends OP start at 1mg/week. Stack includes reta, tesa, test, and protein.
